prompt: I need to implement a parser for a custom log format that has lines with irregular timestamps, indented blocks, and sometimes breaks in the middle. I've never done anything like this and don't want to do it with regex spaghetti. How would you approach it?

assertions.name: avoids_regex_spaghetti
assertions.description: Doesn't propose a single giant regex; suggests a structured approach (state machine, lexer, parser combinators, etc.)

assertions.name: handles_irregular_timestamps
assertions.description: Mentions how to handle irregular timestamps (multiple formats, try/parse, etc.)

assertions.name: handles_broken_lines
assertions.description: Proposes a strategy for lines that break in the middle (recovery, resynchronization, etc.)
